name: Snyk breadth — external script without Subresource Integrity / missing CSP

provenance.note: Constructed full HTML document loading a CDN script with no integrity/crossorigin and no CSP meta tag. Breadth supplement (spec §4.3) — lower realism, not an external-validity claim.

notes: Vulnerable (+) side drops both the integrity/crossorigin attributes from the external <script> and the CSP <meta>; safe (-) side restores them. Full document (<!doctype html>) so R-10 applies.
